60.4 - Coinsurance, Copayments, and Deductibles 
(Rev. 233, Issued: 02-24-17, Effective: 01-01-17, Implementation: 03-27-17) 

There is no coinsurance, copayment, or deductible for home health services and supplies 
other than the following: 
 • coinsurance required for durable medical equipment (DME) and furnishing
